description_te: రైతులకు ఉచిత బోర్‌వెల్ తవ్వకం. ₹1,00,000 వరకు ఉచిత borwell. భూగర్భ జలాల కోసం.
description_en: Free borewell drilling for farmers. Up to ₹1,00,000 free borewell for groundwater.

eligibility_criteria.land_limit: Maximum 5 acres for dry land / 2.5 acres for wet land
eligibility_criteria.no_existing_well: Should not have an existing functional borewell

application_process_te:
1. సచివాలయంలో Agriculture/VRO దగ్గర apply
2. Ground water department survey
3. Geophysical survey for water point identification
4. Approved అయితే free drilling
